advanced_candidate.construction: standard + EVAL-010 correction with phase scales 1,1,1,0

architecture_audit.conclusion: Interaction signal remains after EVAL-010, especially in phases 1-3, but it has not exceeded the full additive-table control or passed a playing-strength gate.

search_combination.candidate: adaptive two-ply LMR plus calibrated MPC

decision.phase_3_disabled_candidate: advance after candidate-specific MPC recalibration or an explicitly MPC-off comparison
decision.interaction_runtime: not implemented until ranking/regret training and speed gates are defined
decision.adaptive_lmr_plus_mpc: rejected because parallel depth gain missed the predeclared gate
decision.runtime_conflict: The accepted MPC parameters are SHA-gated to the standard model and automatically disable for the phase-3-disabled candidate.
